mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_import_jobs ( id, user_id, source_type, source_ref_id, status, max_reviews, total_items, skipped_existing_count, triggered_count, completed_count, failed_count, request_payload, error_message, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{sourceType, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportSourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportJobStatus}, #{maxReviews}, #{totalItems}, #{skippedExistingCount}, #{triggeredCount}, #{completedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{requestPayload}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE place_import_jobs SET status = #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportJobStatus}, total_items = #{totalItems}, skipped_existing_count = #{skippedExistingCount}, triggered_count = #{triggeredCount}, completed_count = #{completedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_import_job_items ( id, job_id, source_ref_id, activity_id, source_url, source_address, source_original_url, source_candidate_key, candidate_name, google_place_id, cid, latitude, longitude, existing_place_id, imported_place_id, python_job_id, status, approval_status, approval_note, approved_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{jobId}, #{sourceRefId}, #{activityId}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceAddress}, #{sourceOriginalUrl}, #{sourceCandidateKey}, #{candidateName}, #{googlePlaceId}, #{cid}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{existingPlaceId}, #{importedPlaceId}, #{pythonJobId}, #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportJobItemStatus}, #{approvalStatus, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportApprovalStatus}, #{approvalNote}, #{approvedAt}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE place_import_job_items SET source_url = #{sourceUrl}, source_address = #{sourceAddress}, source_original_url = #{sourceOriginalUrl}, source_candidate_key = #{sourceCandidateKey}, candidate_name = #{candidateName}, google_place_id = #{googlePlaceId}, cid = #{cid}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, existing_place_id = #{existingPlaceId}, imported_place_id = #{importedPlaceId}, python_job_id = #{pythonJobId}, status = #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportJobItemStatus}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.PlaceImportApprovalStatus}, approval_note = #{approvalNote}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM place_import_job_items WHERE source_ref_id = #{socialJobId} AND activity_id IS NULL AND source_candidate_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.sql: i.id, i.job_id, j.source_type, i.source_ref_id, i.activity_id, a.name AS activity_name, i.candidate_name, i.source_url, i.source_address, i.source_original_url, i.google_place_id, i.cid, i.latitude, i.longitude, COALESCE(i.imported_place_id, i.existing_place_id) AS mapped_place_id, p.title AS mapped_place_name, p.address AS mapped_place_address, p.google_maps_link AS mapped_place_google_maps_link, p.visibility_status AS mapped_place_visibility_status, i.status, i.approval_status, i.approval_note, i.error_message, i.created_at, i.approved_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM place_import_job_items i JOIN place_import_jobs j ON j.id = i.job_id LEFT JOIN activities a ON a.id = i.activity_id LEFT JOIN places p ON p.id = COALESCE(i.imported_place_id, i.existing_place_id) WHERE i.id = #{itemId}
